title: Hierarchy of Inner Product Spaces
description: A visual breakdown showing how an inner product space is built by adding structure to more fundamental algebraic constructs.
relationships: A Vector Space provides the foundational set and operations.
An Inner Product is added as a function mapping two vectors to a scalar, defining geometry.
The Norm is derived from the inner product to measure length.
The Metric is derived from the norm to measure distance.
The Angle between vectors is defined using the inner product and norms.
